setting: France, 1917 — a ruined farmhouse command post on the Western Front, the morning after an assault
North Sea, 1943 — aboard a Finnish Navy patrol vessel that has intercepted a drifting trawler in international waters
Yucatan, 14th century — inside a Maya temple complex during the feast of Tlacaxipehualiztli, when ritual heart sacrifice is performed
Central Asian steppe, 1206 — the forward camp of a Mongol scouting party riding ahead of Genghis Khan's main horde
